name: Improve Credit LLC
description_short: Charlotte-based credit repair firm offering dispute services, credit monitoring, and financial counseling with 19+ years of experience and claimed $25M in customer savings.
description_long:
Improve Credit LLC is a credit repair consulting firm based in Charlotte, North Carolina, that positions itself as a provider of credit expertise and consumer education. The company emphasizes its background in the lending industry and claims over 19 years of experience, along with achievement of a $25 million cumulative savings milestone for customers through credit improvement. Their website highlights awards and certification as credit experts, though specific certifications are not detailed.

The company offers a portfolio of services centered on credit repair: personal credit repair (their primary service), business credit establishment and repair, credit monitoring systems, credit counseling, and identity theft assistance. They also provide educational content through a blog and media section. Their pricing structure includes a discounted initial consultation at $99, after which service fees are not transparently published on their website. The company claims to use "proven strategies" and emphasizes personalized service rather than treating clients as transaction numbers.

Improve Credit differentiates itself through several stated values: emphasis on education and knowledge transfer to clients, claims of getting results "right the first time," personalized service approach, and leveraging industry lending experience. They highlight responsive communication, straightforward practices (explicitly stating they don't make false promises), and 19 years of operational history. The firm uses testimonials to demonstrate client outcomes, including one case involving credit improvement leading to mortgage pre-qualification.

However, several concerns warrant mention. The website contains no transparent pricing, certification details, or specific explanation of their dispute methodology—critical information for evaluating credit repair services. Claims like "surpassed 25 million dollar mark" lack context on how savings are calculated. No information about compliance with CROA (Credit Repair Organizations Act) is visible. The company name appears as both "Improve Credit LLC" and "Improve Credit Consulting Firm" inconsistently. As with any credit repair firm, results depend heavily on individual credit situations and dispute outcomes controlled by credit bureaus, not the service provider.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 19+ years claimed operational experience in credit repair industry
Claims $25 million in cumulative customer savings on mortgages and car loans
Offers multiple related services beyond disputes (monitoring, counseling, business credit, identity theft)
Emphasizes client education and knowledge transfer throughout engagement
Includes business credit repair, a service less common than personal credit repair
Stated commitment to straightforward practices and not making false promises
cons: No transparent pricing structure for ongoing services published on website
Specific certifications and credentials not detailed or verifiable from website content
No CROA compliance statement or explanation of dispute methodology visible
Savings claims ($25M total) lack clear definition of how calculations are performed
Company name used inconsistently (LLC vs. Consulting Firm) on website
best_for: Business owners seeking to establish or repair business credit alongside personal credit improvement
Charlotte-area residents preferring local, in-person credit repair consultation
Consumers wanting credit education and ongoing knowledge transfer, not just dispute filing
Clients seeking bundled services (repair, monitoring, counseling) from a single provider
diagnosis: Improve Credit LLC is best suited for Charlotte-area consumers or business owners needing comprehensive credit repair with an emphasis on education and personalized service. The main caveat is that specific pricing, detailed credentials, and CROA compliance information are not transparent on their website, requiring direct contact before engagement; additionally, credit repair results ultimately depend on dispute outcomes determined by credit bureaus, not the service provider.
services: Personal credit repair and dispute services
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
